name: Vortos high HTTP 5xx rate
message: Vortos HTTP 5xx rate is above 5%. Review service logs and traces.

name: Vortos CQRS command p95 latency high
message: Vortos CQRS command latency is high.

name: Vortos outbox backlog growing

message: Security denials are elevated. Check auth and authorization logs.
